The central station log records user 'BTILL' acknowledged the alarm. Tilling's own statement confirms she acknowledged it from the central station screen. Pruitt's denial is consistent with this; the conflict resolves in favor of Tilling having acknowledged.

Rao's reconciliation note that the bag retrieved at 14:02 was returned sealed and unspiked; Okafor's bedside finding that only the original Ramos bag (hung 13:44, ~140 mL remaining) was at the bedside; cabinet recount reconciled.

The Pyxis nightly summary reported 14:02:21; the central pharmacy server records 14:02:51. The 14:02:51 value is authoritative. Per Addendum A, the unit terminal had a clock-skew issue corrected on March 12, 2026; the nightly summary value 14:02:21 is superseded.
